summary: M393 — combat HUD overhaul pass: 2.5D grid lifted above HUD, single-row spell rail, compact companion frames, AI badge dropped, manual-mode hides speed/step buttons, captions repositioned, tap-clicks bail on new HUD, portrait fallback chain prefers south then portrait then east, 1v1 placed face-to-face on same row, debug placement knobs feed grid spacing, Show Companion Frames toggle.
